title: Poppy Playtime by Wish Team
description: This mod add content from Poppy Playtime.
body:
This mod add block, entity, decor, mechanics

• The mod includes a grab pack, a scanner for it, which provides redstone, doors, colorful tiles, Huggy Wuggy, Kissy Missy, Mommy Long Legs, Banzo Bunnie, Prototype, Poppy, and Mini Huggy.

• With the mod, you can create a mini game with Banzo Bunnie and use the Mini Huggy mechanic.

**This mod requires: Geckolib**
